data.title: Israel's tourism industry is recovering after a devastating Hamas assault in 2023, indicating strong signs of revival.
data.description: In Los Angeles on October 23, 2025, it was reported that Israel's tourism sector is experiencing significant recovery, two years following the harmful Hamas attack on October 7, 2023. America Israel Tours® (AIT), a prominent Holy Land travel company in the U.S., confirmed these positive developments. The industry is showing promising growth, with hotels and tourist destinations displaying increased activity.

data.title: Quantum BioPharma's licensee Unbuzzd Wellness to host webinar for its innovative beverage speeding alcohol metabolism, reducing symptoms of intoxication. Webinar on Oct 30, 2025, part of $5 million raise. Quantum BioPharma shareholders not diluted.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, Quantum BioPharma Ltd. (NASDAQ: QNTM) (CSE: QNTM) (FRA: 0K91) (Upstream: QNTM) disclosed plans for an Investor Webinar to be conducted by its licensee Unbuzzd Wellness Inc., the creator of unbuzzd TM - a beverage known for its ability to enhance alcohol metabolism, mental clarity, and reduce hangover symptoms. The webinar, scheduled for Thursday, October 30, 2025, at 4:15 pm EST (1:15 pm PST), will accompany Unbuzzd’s Reg D 506 (c) offering aiming to raise up to $5 million. Quantum BioPharma ensures its shareholders will not face any dilution due to this fundraising initiative. Quantum BioPharma is focused on developing novel solutions for neurodegenerative, metabolic disorders, and alcohol misuse, with multiple drug candidates in various developmental stages.

data.title: ZenaTech's Zena AI Division to be located in Baton Rouge, LA, offering advanced drone solutions for US Defense and Homeland Security.
data.description: ZenaTech has officially announced the establishment of its Zena AI Division, focusing on cutting-edge AI-driven drone solutions tailored for US Defense and Homeland Security purposes. The division will be situated in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, with intentions to spearhead innovative technologies in these sectors. This strategic move marks a significant development for ZenaTech as it capitalizes on the increasing demand for advanced AI applications. The decision to base the division in Baton Rouge underscores the region's potential for fostering groundbreaking advancements in AI and drone integration. This initiative aligns with ZenaTech's commitment to playing a pivotal role in enhancing national security measures. Louisiana's dynamic environment offers favorable conditions for Zena AI Division to flourish and contribute to the evolving landscape of defense and homeland security technologies.

data.title: Beyond Air, Inc. to report Q2 2026 financial results on Nov 10, 2025 at 4:30 PM ET. Call in at 1-877-407-0784.
data.description: Beyond Air, Inc., a medical device and biopharmaceutical company focusing on nitric oxide to help patients, will release its financial results for the second fiscal quarter ending September 30, 2025, on November 10, 2025. A conference call and webcast will be held at 4:30 pm Eastern Time on the same day, with the call accessible domestically at 1-877-407-0784 and internationally at 1-201-689-8560 with the Conference ID: 13756730. Beyond Air is dedicated to using nitric oxide to aid patients with respiratory illnesses, neurological disorders, and solid tumors. Their first system, LungFit™ PH, has FDA approval and CE Mark for treating neonates with hypoxic respiratory failure. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Amaero reports $4.7 million revenue in September 2025 quarter, a 445% increase from Q1, with $50.9 million cash balance. CEO relocates to Tennessee. Collaboration with Castheon on C103 material properties.
data.description: Amaero Ltd, a U.S. producer of high-value C103, refractory alloy, and titanium powders for defense, space, and aviation industries, reported revenue of A$4.7 million in the quarterly period ending 30 September 2025, a 445% increase from Q1 FY2025. Revenue came from A$4.1 million in powder sales and A$0.6 million from manufacturing. Cash used in operations was A$9.9 million, with the company having a cash balance of A$50.9 million. They received US$5.7 million from an EXIM Bank equipment financing loan. Production increased but was insufficient to meet demand, with a backlog of unfilled orders totaling A$0.5 million. Customer shipments and atomization both saw significant increases. The CEO relocated to Chattanooga, Tennessee, and a material improvement collaboration was completed with Castheon/ADDMAN to enhance material properties. Operations are being restructured to scale production, with new equipment ordered and a focus on quality control.

data.title: Investors eyeing $500 monthly from Ford stock with 4.83% dividend yield needing 10,000 shares or $124,300 investment.
data.description: Ford Motor Company (NYSE: F) will report Q3 earnings on Oct. 23. Investors eyeing dividends may be interested in its 4.83% annual yield, paying 15 cents per share quarterly (60 cents annually). To earn $500 monthly, one would need around $124,300 or 10,000 shares. For $100 monthly, $24,860 or 2,000 shares are needed. To calculate, divide desired yearly income ($6,000 or $1,200) by the dividend ($0.60).

data.title: STMicroelectronics CFO warns of margin squeeze, reports Q3 $3.19B revenue, 2% YoY decline, 29 cents EPS (above estimate). Margins fall to 33.2%.
data.description: STMicroelectronics shares on NYSE experienced a decline despite better-than-expected Q3 2025 results. The company reported quarterly net revenues of $3.19 billion, surpassing estimates and landing above its own outlook range. Key drivers were Personal Electronics strength, with Automotive and Industrial segments meeting expectations and CECP in line. Adjusted EPS of 29 cents exceeded the consensus of 23 cents, however, a gross margin decline to 33.2% (460 bps lower YoY) fell short of the company's outlook of 33.5%. Factors included lower manufacturing efficiencies and negative currency effects. This news is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Boyd featured at NVIDIA GTC in Washington, D.C., highlighting innovations and partnerships for AI computing.
data.description: Boyd is set to exhibit its newest advancements at NVIDIA GTC Washington, D.C. The company will be working closely with key players in the industry to speed up the progress of next-generation AI computing.

data.title: OpenX appoints 5 executives to enhance programmatic experience for buyers & publishers, prioritizing quality & transparency.
data.description: In New York, global omnichannel supply-side platform OpenX Technologies, Inc. has revealed a significant advancement in its leadership team by adding five senior executives in key areas such as product, marketing, communications, and operations. The move emphasizes OpenX's focus on three key principles: providing transparent and top-notch inventory, fostering data innovation, and guaranteeing exceptional performance that maximizes budget allocation to working media.

data.title: NETSCOUT expands Kubernetes visibility, addressing challenges in large deployments with new innovation. #observability
data.description: NETSCOUT® SYSTEMS, INC. revealed a new innovation to address the rising demand for observability in intricate cloud settings. This advancement targets organizations dealing with extensive multicluster Kubernetes deployments, aiming to tackle visibility issues in their environments. NETSCOUT® is known for its expertise in observability, AIOps, cybersecurity, and DDoS attack protection solutions. The company, listed on NASDAQ as NTCT, introduces this solution to aid organizations facing challenges in monitoring complex cloud environments effectively.

data.title: Nintendo releases Plants vs Zombies: Replanted on Nintendo Switch, remastered with upscaled graphics and new levels.
data.description: In Redmond, Wash., this week's Nintendo Download features new content for Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2. Players can now enjoy Plants vs. Zombies: Replanted, a remastered version of the classic strategy game. This updated edition includes enhanced graphics, new levels, fresh twists, and 15 years' worth of hidden franchise history. Gamers can immerse themselves in the nostalgia of Peashooters and tend to their virtual gardens. Get ready to uncover new secrets and experience the game that started it all.

data.title: electroCore (Nasdaq: ECOR) to report Q3 financials on Nov 5, 2025, after market close. September 30, 2025, results to be disclosed.
data.description: ElectroCore, Inc. (Nasdaq: ECOR), a bioelectronic medicine and wellness company based in Rockaway, N.J., is set to release its financial results for the third quarter of 2025 on Wednesday, November 5, 2025. The report will cover the period ending September 30, 2025, and will be made public after the close of the market. This announcement signifies an important update for the commercial-stage company, allowing investors and stakeholders to gain insight into its performance.

data.title: Typeform unveils AI platform for forms, automation, and analytics. Launch on Oct. 23, 2025, in San Francisco.
data.description: In San Francisco on October 23, 2025, Typeform introduced its AI engagement platform, a significant advancement as the company transitions from solely being a form building tool. This new platform combines form creation, automation, and analytics to assist businesses in capturing, connecting, and converting leads all within a single interface. The integration of AI technology is aimed at streamlining the process and enhancing outcomes. The launch signifies Typeform's commitment to providing comprehensive solutions for businesses looking to optimize their online interactions.

data.title: Genprex offers $8.1M with $2.7M upfront and $5.4M potential through short-term warrants under Nasdaq rules.
data.description: Genprex, Inc. ("Genprex"), a gene therapy company based in Austin, Texas, announced on October 23, 2025, that it received $2.7 million upfront. Additionally, there is a potential to generate up to $5.4 million in total gross proceeds if short-term warrants are fully exercised. Genprex operates as a clinical-stage company and is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol GNPX.
